question: How many battles did not lose any ship with tonnage '225'?
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT lost_in_battle FROM ship WHERE tonnage  =  '225' );
predicted_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM table_1 WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT T2.col_1 FROM table_2 AS T2 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T2.col_2 = T3.col_1 WHERE T3.col_3 = 225)
raw_response: SELECT count(*) FROM table_1 WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT T2.col_1 FROM table_2 AS T2 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T2.col_2 = T3.col_1 WHERE T3.col_3 = 225)
